description: Elsa is the queen of Arendelle who has magical powers to create and control ice and snow.
Anna is Elsa's brave younger sister who goes on an adventure to save her kingdom.
Olaf is a cheerful snowman created by Elsa's magic who loves warm hugs.
Moana is the daughter of the chief of Motunui who sails across the ocean to save her people.
Maui is a powerful demigod who helps Moana restore the heart of Te Fiti.
Simba is a lion prince who grows up to reclaim his place as king of the Pride Lands.
Mufasa is the wise and noble king of the Pride Lands and Simba's father.
Nala is Simba's loyal childhood friend who helps him return to the Pride Lands.
Aladdin is a kind-hearted street thief who discovers a magical lamp.
Genie is a magical being who grants three wishes to whoever holds the lamp.
Princess Jasmine is the independent princess of Agrabah.
Ariel is a curious mermaid princess who dreams of living in the human world.
Prince Eric is the human prince who Ariel falls in love with.
Belle is an intelligent young woman who befriends the Beast.
The Beast is a cursed prince who must learn to love to break the spell.
Rapunzel is a princess with magical long hair that has healing powers.
Flynn Rider also known as Eugene Fitzherbert is a charming thief who helps Rapunzel escape the tower.
Woody is a cowboy toy and the loyal leader of Andy's toys.
Buzz Lightyear is a space ranger toy who believes he is a real hero.
Lightning McQueen is a race car who learns the value of friendship.
Mater is a rusty tow truck and McQueen's best friend.
Mickey Mouse is one of the most iconic characters created by Walt Disney.
Donald Duck is known for his funny voice and short temper.
Goofy is a tall and clumsy but lovable Disney character.
Peter Pan is a boy who never grows up and lives in Neverland.
Tinker Bell is a small fairy and Peter Pan's loyal companion.
Hercules is a demigod with incredible strength who seeks to become a true hero.
Megara is a clever and independent woman who eventually falls in love with Hercules.
Baymax is a healthcare robot created to help people.
Hiro is a robotics genius who forms a superhero team with Baymax.
